name: P.E.K.K.A Bridge Spam
description: Pressure opponents at the bridge with fast-moving threat cards. Use P.E.K.K.A for heavy tank defense, then counter-push with Battle Ram and Bandit.

name: Hog 2.6 Cycle (Classic Var)
description: A very fast cycle deck. Defend efficiently using cheap troops, pull enemies with Cannon and Knight, and cycle Hog Riders to chip away at towers.

name: Golem Beatdown
description: Build massive, unstoppable pushes in double elixir. Sacrificial tower damage in early game, drop Golem in the back, and support with Night Witch and Lumberjack.

name: LavaLoon Beatdown
description: An aerial beatdown deck. Tank for the Balloon using the Lava Hound. Use Tornado and spells to clear out air defense troops like Musketeer or Electro Wizard.

name: Log Bait (Classic Var)
description: Bait out the opponent's cheap spells (The Log/Zap) using defense or support cards, then throw your Goblin Barrel directly onto their tower for heavy damage.

name: Giant Sparky Beatdown
description: Support the Giant with Sparky's massive area blast. Use Electro Wizard and Wizard to cover Sparky from swarms and stuns.
